title: Occasional Work of a Female Slave
overview: Roswitha runs an illegal abortion clinic in Frankfurt to support her student husband and children. When she is forced to close her practice she delves into political and social activism.

trailers.title: KLUGE IN THE BEGINNING: PART-TIME WORK OF A DOMESTIC SLAVE
